html:
Exclusive to:

Only during the Event: Year of the Clockwork Knight

Rocking Mare is craftable Structures exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be crafted with 4 Lucky Gold Nugget on Clockwork Knight Shrine during Year of the Clockwork Knight event.

When siiting on the Rocking Mare, the character rocks back and forth, and if an hat is equipped, they take it off and wave it while rocking, except some hats like Enlightened Crown and Brightshade Helm. Emotes cannot be used while seated.

Assets

  • Rocking Mare Place
  • Rocking Mare Using
  • Rocking Mare Burnt
  • Unused icon

“It's a rocky ride!”
–Wilson
“Some kids got all the good stuff.”
–Willow
“It remind Wolfgang of childhood.”
–Wolfgang
“Ah, the innocence of childhood.”
–Wendy
“OSCILLATION UNIT”
–WX-78
“It is a rocking horse, of the sort commonly found in children's nurseries.”
–Wickerbottom
“Might be nice for stress relief.”
–Woodie
“Amusing, perhaps. Still the thought of sitting...”
–Maxwell
“A fine chance för the yöunglings tö learn the saddle!”
–Wigfrid
“Do we get two turns on it?”
–Webber
“Aw, it looks like fun!”
–Warly
“Rocking friend!”
–Wormwood
“Aw ain't that cute.”
–Winona
“Quit talkin' and start rockin'.”
–Wortox
“Me build, me rock. Glurph!”
–Wurt
“I always wanted a rocking horse!”
–Walter
“Riding a horse that goes nowhere? And yet...”
–Wanda
Rocking Mare is craftable Structures exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be crafted with 4 Lucky Gold Nugget on Clockwork Knight Shrine during Year of the Clockwork Knight event.
When siiting on the Rocking Mare, the character rocks back and forth, and if an hat is equipped, they take it off and wave it while rocking, except some hats like Enlightened Crown and Brightshade Helm. Emotes cannot be used while seated.

'''Rocking Mare''' is craftable Structures exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can be crafted with 4 [[Lucky Gold Nugget]] on [[Clockwork Knight Shrine]] during [[Year of the Clockwork Knight]] event. 

When siiting on the Rocking Mare, the character rocks back and forth, and if an hat is equipped, they take it off and wave it while rocking, except some hats like [[Enlightened Crown]] and [[Brightshade Helm]]. Emotes cannot be used while seated.
